chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1025 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.4315/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 25.02.2025 Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Qazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, D.A.G. Mr.Asad Sherwani, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Per learned counsel finalization assessment is pending because of this petition. He seeks that the Department may be directed to finalize the assessment in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
